# Wooden Houses Kenya

> Wooden Houses Kenya is a construction company based in Naivasha, Kenya. We design and build custom wooden houses, off-grid cabins, garden offices, commercial structures, and bespoke furniture across Kenya and East Africa.

## About

Wooden Houses Kenya specialises in sustainable timber construction. Our work spans residential homes, holiday retreats, staff accommodation, commercial meeting rooms, and handcrafted furniture. We have completed projects in Naivasha, Nairobi, Nanyuki, Taita Taveta, and Karen.

We are trusted by major organisations including Masai Mara Wildlife Conservancies Association, Sirikoi Lodge, Mpala Research Center, Majani Mingi Sisal Estate, and HSC Systems Limited.

## Services

- **Custom Wooden Houses** — Fully bespoke wooden homes from foundation to roof, designed to your vision and budget
- **Wooden Cabins & Cottages** — Off-grid retreats, eco-lodges, and holiday homes; solar-ready and sustainably built
- **Garden Studios & Offices** — Home offices and creative studios built in your garden; insulated, internet-ready
- **Renovations & Extensions** — Seamless wooden extensions and renovations to existing properties
- **Commercial Buildings** — Wooden offices, meeting rooms, staff quarters, and hospitality structures
- **Furniture & Carpentry** — Bespoke hardwood kitchen cabinets, garden furniture, benches, and custom carpentry
- **Outdoor Structures** — Pergolas, decking, garden benches, and outdoor entertainment areas

## Notable Projects

- Off-the-Grid Cottage, Nanyuki (2024) — Solar-powered, rainwater harvesting, sustainably sourced timber
- Holiday Home, Naivasha (2024) — Lakeside retreat with wraparound decking and panoramic views
- Staff Meeting Room, Taita Taveta (2023) — Commercial meeting room for 30 people with AV integration
- Custom Kitchen Fittings, Nairobi (2024) — Bespoke mvule and cypress hardwood cabinetry
- Foldable Garden Chairs, Nairobi (2024) — Production run of 50 weather-treated foldable chairs for an eco-resort
- Garden Benches Collection, Karen Nairobi (2023) — Handcrafted benches for a private estate

## Partners & Clients

- Masai Mara Wildlife Conservancies Association
- Sirikoi Lodge
- Mpala Research Center, Nanyuki
- Majani Mingi Sisal Estate Limited
- HSC Systems Limited
